description:
A web-app team has handed you a raw Apache access log stored at
    /home/user/projects/weblog/access.log and wants two things:

    1.  A filtered, privacy-safe copy that only contains successful
        (HTTP 200) requests for image assets
        (case-insensitive *.png, *.jpg, *.jpeg, *.gif).  
        • Only lines that match *all* of the following are kept:  
            – the path ends in “.png” “.jpg” “.jpeg” or “.gif” (match is
              case-insensitive, so “.PNG” also counts)  
            – the response status code is exactly 200  
        • For every kept line, the client IP address (the first field) must
          be replaced by the literal placeholder “ANONYMIZED_IP”.  
          Nothing else in the line may be altered (spacing, quotes, etc.).  
        • The result must be written to
          /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/anonymized_access.log  
          (create the directory if it does not exist).

    2.  A tiny one-line summary file named
        /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/filter_report.txt containing
        exactly these three, pipe-delimited numbers in this order:  
            <total_lines_in_original>|<lines_kept>|<lines_dropped>  
        There must be **no** whitespace around the pipes and the file must
        end with a single trailing newline.  
        Example (for illustration only):  
            875|24|851⏎

    Important verification details the automated grader will check:

    • The relative ordering of kept lines must be identical to their
      ordering in the original log.  
    • The strings “ANONYMIZED_IP” in anonymized_access.log must be
      uppercase and appear exactly once per retained line, in the position
      where the original IP appeared.  
    • The access log is in the standard combined Apache format.  
    • Use regular expressions or appropriate CLI tools; do not hard-code
      line numbers.  
    • Do not modify or delete /home/user/projects/weblog/access.log.  
    • Aside from the two files above, do not create any other files inside
      /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered.

    Deliverables to be present when you finish:

    1. Directory:  /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered
    2. File:       /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/anonymized_access.log  
                   (containing only the anonymized image-request lines)
    3. File:       /home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/filter_report.txt  
                   (single line, “totals|kept|dropped”, trailing newline)

    You may create whatever temporary files or scripts you need elsewhere,
    but only the two files listed above will be graded.
truth:
<!-- Original log present before task starts -->
    <original_log_path>/home/user/projects/weblog/access.log</original_log_path>
    <original_log_contents><![CDATA[
93.184.216.34 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:36 +0000] "GET /assets/logo.png HTTP/1.1" 200 5321 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
185.199.110.153 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:37 +0000] "GET /api/user?id=42 HTTP/1.1" 200 1234 "-" "curl/8.5.0"
203.0.113.7 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:37 +0000] "GET /assets/banner.JPG HTTP/1.1" 200 23122 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
203.0.113.7 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:38 +0000] "GET /assets/banner.JPG HTTP/1.1" 304 0 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
192.0.2.44 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:39 +0000] "POST /login HTTP/1.1" 302 0 "https://example.com/login" "Mozilla/5.0"
198.51.100.23 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:40 +0000] "GET /assets/sprite.gif HTTP/1.1" 200 998 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
198.51.100.23 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:41 +0000] "GET /assets/sprite.gif HTTP/1.1" 404 209 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
203.0.113.9 - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:42 +0000] "GET /assets/bg.jpeg HTTP/1.1" 200 14231 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
    ]]></original_log_contents>

    <!-- Expected output after agent completion -->
    <filtered_dir>/home/user/projects/weblog/filtered</filtered_dir>

    <expected_anonymized_access_log_path>/home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/anonymized_access.log</expected_anonymized_access_log_path>
    <expected_anonymized_access_log_contents><![CDATA[
ANONYMIZED_IP - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:36 +0000] "GET /assets/logo.png HTTP/1.1" 200 5321 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
ANONYMIZED_IP - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:37 +0000] "GET /assets/banner.JPG HTTP/1.1" 200 23122 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
ANONYMIZED_IP - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:40 +0000] "GET /assets/sprite.gif HTTP/1.1" 200 998 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
ANONYMIZED_IP - - [10/Jun/2024:13:55:42 +0000] "GET /assets/bg.jpeg HTTP/1.1" 200 14231 "https://example.com/" "Mozilla/5.0"
    ]]></expected_anonymized_access_log_contents>

    <!-- Summary numbers: total=8, kept=4, dropped=4 -->
    <expected_filter_report_path>/home/user/projects/weblog/filtered/filter_report.txt</expected_filter_report_path>
    <expected_filter_report_contents>8|4|4
</expected_filter_report_contents>
